nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Opal-crowned manakin
nodes.summary: Opal-crowned manakin（Opal-crowned manakin，学名 Lepidothrix iris），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于森林、次生林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐、栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species inhabits humid lowland terra firme forest and mature secondary woodland

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species inhabits humid lowland terra firme forest and mature secondary woodland

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The species is threatened by continuing deforestation as land is cleared for cattle ranching and soy production, facilitated by expansion of the road network...Recent changes to environmental policy in Brazil are seemingly incentivizing farmers to clear more land, and the rate of clear-fell deforestation and wildfire intensity in Brazilian Amazonia have increased since 2018." It is considered "[u]ncommon or rare to locally fairly common"

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "Since it appears to tolerate a degree of habitat degradation, its population is projected to decline by 30–69% or more over three generations." It occurs in a few protected areas
